# Sildenafil 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Sildenafil 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Sildenafil</strong> 目前有 <strong>24 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Sildenafil 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of men with erectile dysfunction, which is the inability to achieve or maintain a penile erection sufficient for satisfactory sexual performance. In order for sildenafil to be effective,...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（98.4%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（98.2%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（98.0%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（97.9%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（97.8%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（93.8%）</li>
<li>hypoalphalipoproteinemia（90.1%）</li>
<li>familial isolated trichomegaly（79.8%）</li>
<li>genetic alopecia（75.0%）</li>
<li>obsolete patella aplasia, coxa vara, and tarsal synostosis（70.0%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（69.9%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary, autosomal recessive（69.2%）</li>
<li>familial clubfoot due to 17q23.1q23.2 microduplication（68.8%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（68.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（68.1%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（67.7%）</li>
<li>chromosome 17q23.1-q23.2 deletion syndrome（66.8%）</li>
<li>pulmonary arterial hypertension associated with congenital heart disease（66.6%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（66.1%）</li>
<li>coxopodopatellar syndrome（65.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/sildenafil/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
